title: [codereview-pass3-security] gateway.rs is_local_mesh: routes check is coarse; no RPL DAO integration for full DODAG knowledge. P3 robustness. Convergence after addressing. Tagged codereview
close_reason: Integrated RPL DAO routing table lookup into is_local_mesh for full DODAG knowledge at root; added process_rpl delegation to RplNode. Robustness improved.
